description_long: This bench features a modern, industrial design with a sturdy rectangular metal frame supporting both the seat and backrest. The seat and backrest are constructed from horizontal wooden slats, giving it a natural yet contemporary appearance. The armrests are integrated into the metal frame, forming a continuous geometric outline on both sides. The wood appears weathered, suggesting durability for outdoor use, while the metal frame is robust and likely powder-coated for corrosion resistance. The bench is wide enough to comfortably seat two to three people and has a slightly reclined backrest for ergonomic support. Its open, angular leg design provides stability and a distinctive visual profile.
description: A modern bench with a rectangular metal frame and horizontal wooden slats for the seat and backrest, featuring integrated armrests and a sturdy, angular design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the seat, the thickness of the wooden slats, and the full rectangular metal armrest and leg structure.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the horizontal wooden backrest slats and the solid, squared metal frame on both sides.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the seat's depth and the robust metal frame.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the full width of the seat, the arrangement of the wooden slats, and the open space between the armrests.
